title: Organize Obsidian To-Do Lists
first_prompt: Use MCP filesystem to go into my Obsidian vault and move all of the unchecked To-Dos from yesterday to today's To-Do list.
summary: Irwin was attempting to automate the organization of his personal knowledge base by transferring unchecked to-do items from a previous day's journal entry to the current day's entry within his Obsidian vault. After the assistant confirmed access to the vault, Irwin specified the exact location as `Personal/Journal`. The assistant then confirmed the dates (December 17 and December 18, 2024) and prepared to read both files to execute the proposed transfer of unchecked to-dos.
